annotations.text_en: Aston Martin was trapped in traffic hell: Stroll spent 87.5% of his 8-lap race in dirty air, Alonso 59.3% of 27 laps. Both cars are too slow to overtake but fast enough to not be lapped immediately, creating a traffic prison. This is the worst possible position on the 2026 grid.
annotations.text_tr: Aston Martin trafik cehenneminde kaldi: Stroll 8 turlu yarisinin %87.5'ini kirli havada gecirdi, Alonso 27 turun %59.3'unu. Iki arac da sollama yapamayacak kadar yavas ama hemen tur yemeyecek kadar hizli, bir trafik hapishanesi olusturuyor. Bu 2026 gridinde olunabilecek en kotu pozisyon.

annotations.text_en: Bearman's pace degradation in traffic was the worst: +1.93s per lap when following another car. Yet he climbed from P12 to P5 and held it for 36 laps. His strategy was to overtake quickly rather than follow: minimize dirty air exposure by making decisive moves. 31.4% traffic overall for a car that started P10 is impressive.
annotations.text_tr: Bearman'in trafikteki pace kaybi en kotuydu: baska bir araci takip ederken tur basina +1.93 saniye. Yine de P12'den P5'e yukselip 36 tur orada kaldi. Stratejisi takip etmek yerine hizla sollamakti: kararlı hamlelerle kirli hava maruziyetini minimize etmek. P10'dan baslayan bir arac icin toplam %31.4 trafik etkileyici.

annotations.text_en: Antonelli ran in clean air for 80.4% of the race, the most of any full-race driver. Pole position to victory with only 10 laps in traffic. This confirms Mercedes' strategy: qualify at the front, pit under Safety Car, and cruise in clean air. The W17's pace advantage only fully materializes without dirty air.
annotations.text_tr: Antonelli yarisin %80.4'unu temiz havada kostu, tam yaris tamamlayan pilotlar arasinda en yuksek. Pole pozisyonundan galibiyete sadece 10 tur trafik. Bu Mercedes'in stratejisini dogruluyor: onde siralan, Guvenlik Araci altinda pit yap ve temiz havada rahat kos. W17'nin pace avantaji sadece kirli hava olmadan tam olarak ortaya cikiyor.

annotations.text_en: Verstappen spent 42.5% of the race in traffic with a +1.68s pace loss, the second worst among frontrunners. Starting on soft tires from P8 then switching to hards put him in the middle of the pack. The 2-stop strategy forced him through traffic twice, ultimately costing him a potential podium finish.
annotations.text_tr: Verstappen yarisin %42.5'ini trafikte gecirdi ve +1.68 saniye pace kaybi yasadi, on siradaki pilotlar arasinda en kotu ikinci. P8'den yumusak lastiklerle basayip sert lastiklere gecmesi onu paketin ortasina koydu. 2 duraklamali strateji onu iki kez trafikten gecmeye zorladi ve sonunda potansiyel podyum bitisine mal oldu.

annotations.text_en: Perez showed negative pace degradation in traffic (-0.40s), meaning he was actually faster when following another car. At his pace level (P22 qualifier), the slipstream benefit on Shanghai's back straight outweighs the dirty air penalty in corners. A backmarker advantage: no pressure, free tow.
annotations.text_tr: Perez trafikte negatif pace kaybi gosterdi (-0.40s), yani baska bir araci takip ederken aslinda daha hizliydi. Onun pace seviyesinde (siralama P22), Shanghai'in arka duzlugundeki slipstream faydasi virajlardaki kirli hava cezasini asiyor. Arka siradaki avantaj: baski yok, bedava cekis.

annotations.text_en: Antonelli took his maiden pole position: 1:32.064, beating Russell by 0.222s. The fastest sector breakdown shows three different drivers were quickest: Russell in S1 (24.012s), Leclerc in S2 (27.660s), Antonelli in S3 (40.387s). Antonelli's final sector was the difference maker.
annotations.text_tr: Antonelli ilk pole pozisyonunu aldi: 1:32.064, Russell'i 0.222 saniye yendi. En hizli sektor dagilimi uc farkli pilotun en hizli oldugunu gosteriyor: Russell S1'de (24.012s), Leclerc S2'de (27.660s), Antonelli S3'te (40.387s). Antonelli'nin son sektoru fark yaratan oldu.

annotations.text_en: Ferrari closed the qualifying gap from Melbourne to Shanghai. Hamilton went from +0.960s to +0.351s, Leclerc from +0.809s to +0.364s. The gap between the two Ferraris was just 0.013s in Q3. The SF-26 suits Shanghai better than Albert Park, particularly in the medium-speed S2.
annotations.text_tr: Ferrari Melbourne'dan Shanghai'a siralama farkini kapatti. Hamilton +0.960'tan +0.351'e, Leclerc +0.809'dan +0.364'e geldi. Q3'te iki Ferrari arasindaki fark sadece 0.013 saniyeydi. SF-26 Shanghai'a Albert Park'tan daha uygun, ozellikle orta hizli S2'de.

annotations.text_en: Red Bull dropped significantly: Verstappen from DNS to P8 (+0.938s), Hadjar from P3 to P9 (+1.057s). The RB22 that looked competitive in Melbourne qualifying lost ground in Shanghai. Gasly's Alpine (P7, +0.809s) outqualified both Red Bulls, a surprising result for the team.
annotations.text_tr: Red Bull belirgin sekilde geriledi: Verstappen DNS'ten P8'e (+0.938s), Hadjar P3'ten P9'a (+1.057s). Melbourne siralamada rekabetci gorunen RB22 Shanghai'da zemin kaybetti. Gasly'nin Alpine'i (P7, +0.809s) iki Red Bull'u da gecti, takim icin sasirtici bir sonuc.

annotations.text_en: Perez qualified dead last (P22, +4.842s off pole) on a 1:32 lap. Nearly 5 seconds off the pace over 5.4km. The Cadillac is the slowest car on the grid by a significant margin, with both drivers eliminated in Q1 at both races so far.
annotations.text_tr: Perez en son siralandi (P22, pole'dan +4.842s) 1:32'lik bir turda. 5.4 km uzerinde pace'ten 5 saniye geride. Cadillac belirgin bir farkla griddeki en yavas arac, iki yarista da her iki pilotu Q1'de elendi.

annotations.text_en: Compare Antonelli and Russell on Lap 46 (Antonelli's fastest): ANT 1:35.282 vs RUS ~1:35.4. The speed trace shows nearly identical straight-line speeds but Antonelli carries 2-3 km/h more through the Turn 7-8 complex and the final hairpin. The rookie's late-braking style is becoming his signature.
annotations.text_tr: 46. turda Antonelli ve Russell'i karsilastirin (Antonelli'nin en hizli turu): ANT 1:35.282, RUS ~1:35.4. Hiz grafigi neredeyse ayni duzluk hizlarini ama Antonelli'nin Viraj 7-8 kompleksi ve son U virajda 2-3 km/s daha fazla hiz tasidigini gosteriyor. Rookie'nin gec fren stili imzasi haline geliyor.

annotations.text_en: Compare Hulkenberg and Bearman on any lap to see the Audi energy crisis in action. Hulkenberg's 12% clipping means his speed trace visibly plateaus on the back straight around 310 km/h while Bearman's Haas continues accelerating to 330+. The gap is 20 km/h at the same track position. This is pure energy deficit, not aero.
annotations.text_tr: Hulkenberg ve Bearman'i herhangi bir turda karsilastirarak Audi enerji krizini gorebilirsiniz. Hulkenberg'in %12 clipping'i hiz grafigin arka duzlukte ~310 km/s'de gorunur sekilde plato yapmasina neden olurken Bearman'in Haas'i 330+'ya hizlanmaya devam ediyor. Ayni pist pozisyonunda fark 20 km/s. Bu saf enerji acigi, aero degil.

annotations.text_en: Verstappen's soft tire laps (1-9) show dramatically higher corner entry speeds compared to his hard tire stint. The speed trace reveals 5-8 km/h more through Turn 6 and Turn 13 on softs. But the strategy gamble didn't pay off: he pitted one lap before the Safety Car, missing the free stop window.
annotations.text_tr: Verstappen'in yumusak lastik turlari (1-9) sert lastik stintine kiyasla dramatik olarak daha yuksek viraj giris hizlari gosteriyor. Hiz grafigi softlarda Viraj 6 ve Viraj 13'te 5-8 km/s daha fazla hiz ortaya koyuyor. Ama strateji kumari ise yaramadi: Guvenlik Araci'ndan bir tur once pit yaparak bedava durak penceresini kacirdi.

annotations.text_en: Shanghai's energy map shows the back straight (Turn 13 to Turn 14) as the primary clipping zone. This is where the 2026 super clipping rule bites hardest: at full throttle, up to 250kW is stolen from the ICE to charge the battery. Cars visibly lose acceleration above 310 km/h. The hairpin (Turn 6) and Turn 14 are the main harvesting zones.
annotations.text_tr: Shanghai'in enerji haritasi arka duzlugu (Viraj 13 - Viraj 14) birincil clipping bolgesi olarak gosteriyor. 2026 super clipping kuralinin en sert vurdugu yer burasi: tam gazda bataryayi sarj etmek icin ICE'den 250kW'a kadar calinıyor. Araclar 310 km/s uzerinde gorunur sekilde ivme kaybediyor. U viraj (Viraj 6) ve Viraj 14 ana harvesting bolgeleri.

annotations.text_en: Switch to energy mode on the track map for Hulkenberg: the back straight is almost entirely amber (clipping). The Audi's battery charges so aggressively that Hulkenberg spends 12% of every lap in clipping state. Compare with Gasly next to him: Alpine's back straight is green (deploy) with only a tiny amber section at the very end.
annotations.text_tr: Pist haritasinda Hulkenberg icin enerji moduna gecin: arka duzluk neredeyse tamamen amber (clipping). Audi'nin bataryasi o kadar agresif sarj oluyor ki Hulkenberg her turun %12'sini clipping durumunda geciyor. Yanindaki Gasly ile karsilastirin: Alpine'in arka duzlugu yesil (deploy), sadece en sonunda kucuk bir amber bolum var.

annotations.text_en: Compare the track map energy overlay between Australia (Albert Park) and China (Shanghai). Shanghai has shorter straights and more braking zones, resulting in better energy recovery for all teams. This explains why every team's D/C ratio improved from Melbourne: it's circuit-dependent, not necessarily car development.
annotations.text_tr: Avustralya (Albert Park) ve Cin (Shanghai) arasindaki pist haritasi enerji overlay'ini karsilastirin. Shanghai daha kisa duzluklere ve daha fazla fren bolgesine sahip, tum takimlar icin daha iyi enerji geri kazanimi sagliyor. Bu neden her takimin D/C oraninin Melbourne'dan iyilestigini acikliyor: pist bagimlı, mutlaka arac gelistirmesi degil.
